Just merged PR #1234 for the new user profile endpoint. Looks good, ready for review!
Seeing a ~15% latency spike on the `auth-service` over the last hour. Investigating now.
Closed ticket JIRA-5678, the bug with the reporting dashboard filter. Thanks to @dev_ops for the quick assist!
Heads up: we're rolling out v2.1.0 of the `billing-api` to production in the next 30 minutes. Monitoring closely.
My velocity for this sprint was 42 points, slightly above our target of 40. Great work, team!
Customer `Acme Corp` is experiencing a blocker on their integration due to a rate limit hit on the `/v2/orders` endpoint. Reaching out to their tech lead.
The data pipeline for `daily_active_users` is running about 2 hours behind schedule. Digging into the `user_events` table.
Anyone else seeing intermittent CI failures on the `frontend-app`? PR #1240 is currently blocked.
OOO next week, from Monday to Friday. @backend_lead will be covering critical issues.
A/B test results for the new checkout flow are in! Variant B showed a 3% uplift in conversion rate. 🎉
